mapper.insert:
insert into aiw_news_article_relation (biz_id, article_biz_id, theme_code, theme_name, product_code, relation_type, matched_keywords, source_quality_score, relation_score, evidence, created_at) values
(#{item.bizId}, #{item.articleBizId}, #{item.themeCode}, #{item.themeName}, #{item.productCode}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.matchedKeywords}, #{item.sourceQualityScore}, #{item.relationScore}, #{item.evidence}, #{item.createdAt})
on duplicate key update matched_keywords = values(matched_keywords), source_quality_score = values(source_quality_score), relation_score = values(relation_score), evidence = values(evidence)
